message:
fix: handle small max_len in truncate functions

Fixed a bug in truncate_text and truncate functions where max_len <= 3
would return "..." (3 chars) even when max_len was smaller, violating
the function contract.

Changes:
- repl.rs: Added guard for max_len <= 3, returns truncated text without ellipsis
- main.rs: Fixed both truncate() and truncate_text() with same guard
- stats_analytics.rs: Fixed truncate_text() with same guard
- Added tests for edge cases (max_len = 2, 3, 4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
